name: Stingers Golf Lounge - Restaurant, Bar & Simulators
address: 178 Hwy 50 Suite A, Zephyr Cove, NV 89448
about: Stingers Golf Lounge is an indoor golf and social entertainment venue located in Zephyr Cove, NV. It features two Trackman-powered bays offering tour-grade swing analysis and access to over 400 real-world golf courses. The venue combines premium golf technology with a lounge bar atmosphere, providing a space for both golf and socializing. Public bay bookings are available, and the venue also offers a Gold Annual Membership for unlimited play and exclusive perks.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Trackman technology provides highly accurate ball and club tracking
Access to 400+ real-world golf courses, including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
In-bay food and drink service for a comfortable, uninterrupted experience
Social lounge atmosphere with a full bar and multiple TVs for viewing events

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-driven menu with elevated bar bites and entrees coming soon. A full menu is currently available.
Full bar with handcrafted cocktails, premium spirits, curated wines, and local/regional beers.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two premium bays with tour-grade swing analysis and immersive course play.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for information on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen, serving handcrafted cocktails, premium spirits, and a soon-to-be-launched chef-driven menu. Outside food and drink policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. The duration will depend on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Stingers Golf Lounge is an indoor golf lounge bar focused on an adult atmosphere with alcohol service. It does not promote itself as a family-friendly or kid-friendly venue.
